required_points: Events go through a persistent queue, decoupled from the action that produced them
Retries with exponential backoff; persistent failures hit a dead-letter path or disable the endpoint
Delivery is at-least-once, so consumers need deduplication (event IDs) and payloads should be verifiable (signatures)
strong_signals: Per-endpoint isolation so one slow customer cannot delay others
Discusses ordering guarantees (or explicitly drops them)
red_flags: Fire-and-forget HTTP call from the request path
